description: Dark Mode + Micro-interactions - dark mode toggle using Tailwind dark class strategy with CSS variables, optimistic updates on mutations with rollback, undo toast on destructive actions, smooth list item enter/exit animations, button loading states, success/error shake animations, number count-up on dashboard KPIs, and hover card lift effects.
steps: Update apps/web/src/styles/app.css - add dark mode CSS variables under a .dark class or [data-theme='dark'] selector. Define dark variants of all existing CSS variables (--color-surface, --color-text, --color-border, --color-sidebar, etc.). Add dark background/text defaults.

Create apps/web/src/store/theme.ts - Zustand store for theme: mode ('light'|'dark'|'system'), resolvedTheme ('light'|'dark'), toggle(), setMode(). Persist to localStorage. On init, apply 'dark' class to document.documentElement based on preference. Listen for system prefers-color-scheme changes when mode is 'system'.
Add dark mode toggle to apps/web/src/components/layout/Layout.tsx header - add a sun/moon icon button in the top bar that calls theme store toggle. Also add to Settings page.

Update apps/web/src/components/ui/index.tsx - update Card, Button, Input, Select, Modal, Badge, etc. to use dark mode compatible classes. Replace hardcoded bg-white with bg-[var(--color-surface)], text-gray-900 with text-[var(--color-text)], border-gray-200 with border-[var(--color-border)], etc. Use Tailwind dark: prefix where CSS variables are not used.

Create apps/web/src/hooks/useOptimisticMutation.ts - wrapper around useMutation that implements optimistic updates. Takes: queryKey to update, optimistic updater function, rollback on error. On mutate: immediately update query cache, on error: rollback to previous value and show error toast.

Create apps/web/src/components/ui/UndoToast.tsx - toast component for destructive actions. Shows 'Item deleted. Undo?' with a 5-second countdown timer bar. On 'Undo' click, calls rollback function. On timeout, confirms the deletion. Use react-hot-toast custom component.

Add apps/web/src/hooks/useUndoDelete.ts - hook wrapping delete mutations. On delete: remove item from UI optimistically, show UndoToast with 5s timer. If undo clicked, restore item. If timer expires, execute actual DELETE API call.

Create apps/web/src/components/ui/AnimatedList.tsx - wrapper using Framer Motion AnimatePresence + motion.div for list items. Children animate in (fade + slide from left) and out (fade + slide to right) when added/removed from lists.

Create apps/web/src/components/ui/LoadingButton.tsx - Button variant that shows a spinner inside the button when loading prop is true. Disable button during loading. Replace text with spinner + 'Loading...' or keep text with spinner prefix.
Create apps/web/src/components/ui/CountUp.tsx - animated number component that counts from 0 to target value over ~1 second using requestAnimationFrame. Used on Dashboard StatCards for KPI numbers.

Add hover lift effect to Card component - add transform: translateY(-2px) and enhanced shadow on hover via Tailwind classes (hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-lg). Already partially there, enhance it.
Add success/error shake animation - create CSS keyframes for a subtle horizontal shake (error) and a brief scale pulse (success). Apply via className toggle on form containers after submit result.
Update apps/web/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx - use CountUp component for stat values. Wrap stat cards and chart cards in AnimatedList for entrance animations.

Create apps/web/src/components/ui/DarkMode.test.tsx - test that theme store toggles correctly, that dark class is applied to documentElement, and that components render with dark mode classes. Create apps/web/src/hooks/useOptimisticMutation.test.tsx - test optimistic update and rollback behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Dark mode toggle in header switches between light and dark themes
All UI components (Card, Button, Input, Modal, etc.) render correctly in dark mode
CSS variables change between light and dark themes
Theme preference persists across page reloads
Optimistic updates instantly reflect mutations in the UI before API response
Failed mutations roll back the optimistic update and show error toast
Destructive actions show undo toast with 5-second timer
Clicking 'Undo' within 5 seconds restores the item
List items animate in/out smoothly when added or removed
Buttons show loading spinner during async operations
Dashboard KPI numbers animate counting up on load
Cards have subtle hover lift effect
verification: Run `npx turbo build` from /projects/sandbox/lead-genius-pre- and confirm no TypeScript errors
Run `npx turbo test` from /projects/sandbox/lead-genius-pre- and confirm all tests pass
findings: Card.test.tsx had to be updated to check for bg-[var(--color-surface)] instead of bg-white due to the dark mode CSS variable migration. The workers build has pre-existing TS errors unrelated to this feature. All 159 web tests pass.
